economic_notes: Operates Southquill Gaming Centre & Restaurant and Southquill Gas Bar. Investment in KRW Limited Partnership (Brandon Lands real property development with Keeseekoowenin and Waywayseecappo First Nations), ARM Projects Limited Partnership, and Heritage Co-op. Bridge replacement and upgrade project ($2.96M in progress), solid waste transfer station ($1.31M in progress), and CMHC/ISC housing projects underway.
notes: Prior year (2023) audit was performed by Lazer Grant LLP before its merger with MNP LLP. Segment disclosure totals ($21,669,969 expenses and $27,901,753 revenue) include amortization within segments, reconciling to the consolidated statement which shows $20,261,694 operating expenses plus $1,408,275 amortization. No schedule of remuneration for chief, council, or senior staff was included in the extracted text. Honoraria of $170,775 reported in expenses schedule. Construction in progress of $5,496,739 is significant and not yet capitalized. TLE Trust deferred revenue increased substantially ($1,767,260 vs $578,100 prior year). OSR calculated as total revenue $27,901,753 minus total government transfers (ISC $18,383,027 + CMHC $144,430 + First Peoples Development Inc. $278,321 + Province of Manitoba $206,714 = $19,012,492) = $8,889,261; used federal segment total $18,805,778 + provincial $206,714 + CMHC construction advance $15,043 for cross-check. Province set to MB (Manitoba).
